陈绪来到斩神世界被林七夜的姨妈收留，得到扮演戏神里盗神道魁首白银之王的能力，盗神道的能力，与魔改的诸多神道之力，
此世的天地又是否愿意给盗贼的魁首赐位呢？
“篡天道，夺乾坤。”
他是会成为如白银之王一般的野心家，亦或者成为一个普通的盗贼，又或许会跟林七夜并肩作战呢？
以终焉盗神白银之王的名义，今天势必不会被小南打。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/082e13e79c2c669a79d23c4d308fd60a","author":"玄上宇","author_id":"","book_id":"7447123754020244542","book_name":"斩神，那我可要用无相手了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7447126864583213630","read_count":"20326","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1345691"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"652","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6e64979d5b07a7f0a231daa4034d2a4e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439141&x-signature=YFPHeGPfwh7x%2BG44PduK3Z2R3HM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"55198454550","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"154"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163901BE862ED9EEE38919332C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"list
